LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS SOUGHT BY DEFENDANT MATTIE L STIMPSON IS DENIED. MS. Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Deft Mattie L Stimpson
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ANDREW FORD, Esq., GORDON & WONG, 650.583.3933, for the Plaintiff Asset Acceptance;
Marie Noel Appel, esq., Consumer law office of marie noel appel, 415.901.0508, for defendant Mattie Stimpson.

RULING: ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Defendant Mattie L Stimpson is Denied. Ms. Stimpson is the prevailing the party and is entitled to attorney fees per Civil Code section 1717.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

The parties shall provide courtesy copies of all moving papers and opposition, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 302 no later than August 21, 2012 at 4:00 pm.
